untranslatable_reason: The core signal requires identification of a 10 consecutive candlestick pattern with specific characteristics (10 new price lines after flat base breakout). This pattern recognition logic cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. The allowed indicators cannot detect multi-candlestick pattern formations or enforce consecutive candlestick sequencing. A candlestick pattern detector would be required.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate entry conditions using proxies: price breakout above pivot (breakout detection), volume above 20-period high vol (volume confirmation), and body size exceeding ATR (strong candle magnitude). Exit uses 20-SMA cross as trend reversal signal. However, this is a significant simplification that does not capture the specific '10 New Price Lines' pattern logic.
